---
name: Design Review
about: Submit feedback on an RFC or design document
title: '[DESIGN] '
labels: design-review
assignees: ''
---

## Document
Which document are you reviewing? (e.g., RFC-001, ARCHITECTURE.md)

## Section
Which section(s) does your feedback apply to?

## Feedback
Your detailed feedback, disagreement, or alternative proposal.

## Impact
What would change if your feedback were adopted?
